provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, ancient human male in his 70s who has been a pirate so long he has become respectable by default, wearing a collection of quality gear accumulated over fifty years — a naval coat from three captains ago, boots that have been resoled six times, a sidearm so old it is practically an antique, his clothes are the best-maintained salvage in the Reach because he has had decades to curate them, everyone calls him old man and nobody crosses him
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
